prompt.content:
Client wants a detailed analysis on past insurance claims data shared by client. Client has shared the list of acceptable HCPCS codes for Mental health related insurance claims- 90791, 90792, 90832, 90834, 90837, 90839, 90840. For these codes, answer the following questions-

1. When was the first time allowed [services, charges] and/or payment was made on code 90834?

2. For entries with valid "allowed service"  value, calculate the total payment for the following years individually: 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, and 2019

3. Again for entries with valid allowed service value, assume that 50% of claim payments flow through to the hospital as costs. Of that assume that the client consistently holds a 10% share of total claims over the next 10 years. Using the last 5-year (2018 to 2022) CAGR of total claim payments to project forward, what will the client’s insurance cost be in 2030? Report the CAGR (3 decimals), total payments, and the client's insurance cost in 2030.

4. What is the payment-to-claim ratio for codes 90837, 90839, 90840 (calculated across all years)?

Report values as message in console. Unless specified, round off all dollar values to nearest integer & all percentages to nearest 2 decimal places.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
1. The code "90834" was first used for claim in year 2013.

2. The total value of payments per year is as follows-

2015	 $935,010,479 
2016	 $980,593,580 
2017	 $1,000,561,842 
2018	 $1,046,570,493 
2019	 $1,084,136,130 

3. CAGR for 2028 - 2022 is 0.99%. Total Payment value in 2030 - 1178,472,451Estimated cost of insurance in 2030 is $58,923,623.53 

4. Percentage ratio of payment to claim is as follows for every code-

Code	| Payment to Claim Ratio percentage
90837	| 75.19%
90839	| 75.40%
90840	| 77.61%
